translations.### 2026 Update — Pricing changes for Gi: ### 2026 Update — Pricing changes for GitHub Actions (including Self-hosted Runner)
translations.### CI/CD 實戰指南（一）：CI/CD 是什麼？如何透過 CI/CD 打: ### CI/CD Practical Guide (Part 1): What is CI/CD? How to Build a Stable and Efficient Development Team with CI/CD? Tool Selection?
translations.### Google Apps Script Web App 的用途與為何選擇\: ### The Purpose of Google Apps Script Web App and Why It Was Chosen
translations.#### **架設與維護難易度** Jenkins &gt;&gt;&gt; G: #### **Setup and Maintenance Difficulty** Jenkins >>> GitHub Actions
translations.#### CD — Continuous Delivery / Deployme: #### CD — Continuous Delivery / Deployment Continuous Delivery / Deployment
translations.#### CI — Continuous Integration 持續整合\n\: #### CI — Continuous Integration 持續整合
translations.#### 地端服務 Jenkins / GitHub Actions / Git: #### On-premise Services Jenkins / GitHub Actions / Gitlab CI/CD
translations.#### 故事 — **透過 CI/CD 打造穩定高效的開發團隊**\n\n: #### Story — **Building a Stable and Efficient Development Team through CI/CD**
translations.#### 第三方套件豐富度 Jenkins > GitHub Actions\n: #### Third-Party Plugin Richness Jenkins > GitHub Actions
translations.***聲明：*** *這裡只是提出一種效益計算的方式，不一定是最準確的；只是給大: ***Disclaimer:*** *This is just one way to calculate benefits and may not be the most accurate; it is meant to give everyone a concept to extend, **allowing management to see the value of CI/CD** and authorize the implementation of the entire workflow.*
translations.***開發與維護成本非常非常高而且很難交接。***\n\n: ***Development and maintenance costs are extremely high and handover is very difficult.***
translations.**AI Can Help!**\n**不管是 ChatGPT 或其他 AI 工:
**AI Can Help!**  
**Whether it's ChatGPT or other AI tools, they are very familiar with GAS and can directly help us create packaging forms and connect to the GitHub API.**
translations.**Actions Data Stream：** 提供接近實時的 workflo: **Actions Data Stream:** Provides near real-time workflow/runner event data streams for monitoring and analysis.
translations.**Actions Runner Controller (ARC)** 更新：提: **Actions Runner Controller (ARC)** Update: Improved Deployment, Observability, and Version Management.
translations.**App CI/CD 場景也用不到太深度的功能。*\n\n: **App CI/CD scenarios do not require very advanced features.**
translations.**Asana/Jira** : 專案管理工具，可與 GAS Web App 串: **Asana/Jira**: Project management tools that can integrate with the GAS Web App, allowing QA/PM to directly select the tasks they want to package.
translations.**Bitrise：** 最早期主打提供 App CI/CD 的雲服務，第一次接:
**Bitrise:** One of the earliest cloud services focused on App CI/CD. My first experience with CI/CD was using Bitrise. It offers a user-friendly and intuitive step editor, allowing quick setup of App CI/CD pipelines.  
**Drawbacks:** Initially, it was a $99 flat fee. When Apple M-series processors first launched, they switched to usage-based billing (a form of lock-in), and our team’s monthly cost reached at least $500. So we migrated to GitHub Actions.  
However, recently checking their website, they now offer 1 App / 1 Concurrent / unlimited usage / $89 per month.
translations.**Continuous Delivery:** 只自動部署到 Staging/: **Continuous Delivery:** Automatically deploy only to the Staging/Debug environment; manual verification is required before deploying to the Production environment.
translations.**Continuous Deployment:** 全自動直接部署到 Prod: **Continuous Deployment:** Fully automated deployment directly to the Production environment
translations.**Function as a Service 不需自行架設維護伺服器**\n: **Function as a Service without the need to set up or maintain servers**
translations.**GitHub Actions — Self-hosted Runner**: **GitHub Actions — Self-hosted Runner**: The actual place where CI/CD runs, using a self-hosted runner. You only need to cover the machine purchase cost and can run tasks with unlimited usage.
translations.**GitHub Actions 後來也支援跨 Repo Actions/Run: **GitHub Actions later also supported cross-Repo Actions/Runners.**
translations.**GitHub Actions**\nGitHub 2018 年才推出的 CI:
**GitHub Actions**  
GitHub launched its CI/CD service in 2018, directly integrated with GitHub projects. It has been continuously updated and improved over the years, offering many pre-built steps ([Marketplace](https://github.com/marketplace?type=actions){:target="_blank"}) ready to use. It supports self-hosted runners, allowing unlimited use of your own machines (effectively a hybrid cloud).
translations.**GitHub 也會投入更多資源提升 GitHub Actions 功能：**: **GitHub will also invest more resources to enhance GitHub Actions features:**
translations.**Gitlab CI/CD：**\n比 GitHub Actions 推出的時:
**Gitlab CI/CD:**  
It was launched earlier and has more complete features than GitHub Actions. However, since our project is hosted on GitHub, we do not consider using Gitlab CI/CD. Both have similar functions, and this series will use GitHub Actions as an example.
translations.**Google Apps Script Web App** : 因打包不一定是: **Google Apps Script Web App**: Since packaging is not always handled by engineers, a platform is needed for cross-functional partners to use; GAS Web App can quickly create a web tool and share the URL for others to operate.
translations.**Jenkins：**\n一個專門處理 CI/CD 的開源免費工具、古老但是功:
**Jenkins:**  
An open-source, free tool dedicated to CI/CD, old but powerful; Jenkins covers everything from application-level task design and permission management to low-level service dispatch and execution. It also has [Plugins](https://plugins.jenkins.io/){:target="_blank"} available for direct use and was an essential tool for early DevOps CI/CD.
translations.**Question 1: 對當前正確的功能異動無任何統一檢查機制。**\n\n: **Question 1: There is no unified inspection mechanism for current correct feature changes.**
translations.**Question 2: 耗費大量人力時間在打包工作上。**\n\n: **Question 2: Spending a lot of manpower and time on packaging work.**
translations.**Scale Set Client：** 簡化 Self-hosted Run: **Scale Set Client:** Simplifies the **Autoscaling** of Self-hosted Runners.
translations.**Slack** : 負責接收執行結果通知\n: **Slack**: Responsible for receiving execution result notifications
translations.**XCode Cloud：** 100 小時 / 1 個月 / $50 鎂，優: **XCode Cloud:** 100 hours / 1 month / $50 USD. The advantage is high integration with XCode and App development; however, the downside is it does not support Android and customizing some steps can be difficult. Still, for small pure iOS apps, I would consider using it again.
translations.**multi-label：支援重啟** ，改進 Runner 標籤體驗。\n: **multi-label: Support Restart**, improving the Runner label experience.
translations.**之前的做法是有一位對自動化跟後端很有興趣的夥伴自己用 Kotlin+ktor: **Previously, a team member interested in automation and backend developed a complete backend service using Kotlin+ktor, then set up a server on GCP for Slack integration.**
translations.**使用 Google Apps Script — Web App 的優勢是：*: **The advantages of using Google Apps Script — Web App are:**
translations.**另外有一點需要再次 Highlight 的是 [心流切換成本](https:: **Another point to highlight is the [cost of context switching](https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E5%BF%83%E6%B5%81%E7%90%86%E8%AB%96){:target="_blank"}:**
translations.**回頭看我們的故事，導入 CI/CD 後：**\n\n: **Looking back at our story, after implementing CI/CD:**
translations.**因此後面的文章才會又用 GAS Web App 搭建跨團隊的操作平台。*\n: **This is why the following article uses GAS Web App to build a cross-team operation platform.**
translations.**在無 CI/CD 的場景中可能是：** 花很多時間才發現是被改壞再回頭溝通調: **In scenarios without CI/CD, it might be:** Spending a lot of time only to find out something was broken and then going back to communicate and fix it (CI), QA/PM asking engineers to help package the test version of the app (CD).
translations.**擴展上，GitHub Self-hosted Runner 也支援 [Doc: **Additionally, GitHub Self-hosted Runner also supports [Docker or k8s](https://docs.github.com/en/actions/concepts/runners/about-actions-runner-controller#scaling-runners){:target="_blank"}.**
translations.*也可以用汰換下來的舊 M1 MacBook Pro 當 Runner = 0: *You can also use retired old M1 MacBook Pro as a Runner = 0 cost.*
translations.*以上不考慮電費跟網路費。\n\n: *The above does not include electricity and internet costs.
translations.*以下僅以 App CI/CD 架設為出發點做比較，並不適用所有技術場景。*\n: *The following comparison is based solely on setting up App CI/CD and may not apply to all technical scenarios.*
translations.*在沒有專門做 DevOps 的 App Team，要 App 開發者從 0 到: *For App Teams without dedicated DevOps staff, having App developers build and maintain a Jenkins environment from scratch is too challenging, with few people skilled in it and potential network security issues. Choosing GitHub Actions allows App developers to focus solely on designing the CI/CD process. By briefly reviewing the official documentation on writing workflows and starting Runners, they can quickly set up a free, stable, and secure CI/CD service.*
translations.*在這個比較好用的「介面」上填寫需要的資訊，串接專案管理工具(e.g. Jira: *Fill in the required information on this more user-friendly "interface," connect to project management tools (e.g., Jira, Asana) to fetch Tasks, or directly get the PR list from GitHub. Then select from the dropdown menu and submit, triggering GitHub Actions to start the build via the GitHub API.*
translations.*實在很怕 **雲服務又養套殺** 、希望可控性在自己手上，所以改考慮地端服務。: *Really worried about **cloud services locking you in**, so I prefer to keep control in-house and consider on-premise solutions.*
translations.*自己買一台最新型號的 [Mac Mini 10-core(M4)](https: *Buy the latest model [Mac Mini 10-core (M4)](https://www.apple.com/tw/shop/buy-mac/mac-mini){:target="_blank"} yourself for about $600 USD, place it in the office as a Self-hosted Runner, and it will pay off in about a year; it offers better and faster performance with almost unlimited usage ( **maintenance cost is minimal** ).*
translations.*這裡漏估了 [2026–03–01 起 Self-hosted 需要支付每分鐘: *This missed estimating [Starting 2026–03–01, Self-hosted requires a maintenance fee of $0.002 USD per minute](https://resources.github.com/actions/2026-pricing-changes-for-github-actions/){:target="_blank"}, meaning running 500 minutes costs $1 USD.*
translations.- **Bitrise:** One of the earliest cloud:
- **Bitrise:** One of the earliest cloud services focused on App CI/CD. My first experience with CI/CD was using Bitrise. It offers a user-friendly and intuitive step editor, allowing quick setup of App CI/CD pipelines.  
  **Drawbacks:** Initially, it was a $99 flat fee. When Apple M-series processors first launched, they switched to usage-based billing (a form of lock-in), and our team’s monthly cost reached at least $500. So we migrated to GitHub Actions.  
  However, recently checking their website, they now offer 1 App / 1 Concurrent / unlimited usage / $89 per month.

- **XCode Cloud:** 100 hours / 1 month / $50 USD. The advantage is high integration with XCode and App development; however, the downside is it does not support Android and customizing some steps can be difficult. Still, for small pure iOS apps, I would consider using it again.
translations.- **Continuous Deployment:** Fully autom:
- **Continuous Deployment:** Fully automated deployment directly to the Production environment

- **Continuous Delivery:** Automatically deploy only to the Staging/Debug environment; manual verification is required before deploying to the Production environment.
translations.- **GitHub Actions** : CI/CD workflow sc:
- **GitHub Actions**: CI/CD workflow script code

- **GitHub Actions — Self-hosted Runner**: The actual environment where CI/CD runs, using a self-hosted runner. You only need to cover the machine purchase cost and can run tasks without usage limits.

- **Google Apps Script Web App**: Since packaging is not always done by engineers, a platform is needed for cross-functional team members; GAS Web App can quickly create a web tool and share the URL for others to use.

- **Asana/Jira**: Project management tools that can integrate with the GAS Web App, allowing QA/PM to directly select the tasks they want to package.

- **Slack**: Responsible for receiving execution result notifications
translations.- **Gitlab CI/CD:** \n It was launched:
- **Gitlab CI/CD:**  
  It was launched earlier and offers more complete features than GitHub Actions. However, since our project is hosted on GitHub, we do not consider using Gitlab CI/CD. Both have similar functions, and this series will use GitHub Actions as an example.

- **GitHub Actions**  
  GitHub launched its CI/CD service in 2018, directly integrated with GitHub projects. It has been continuously updated and improved over the years, offering many pre-built steps ([Marketplace](https://github.com/marketplace?type=actions){:target="_blank"}) ready to use. It supports self-hosted runners, allowing unlimited use of your own machines (effectively a hybrid cloud).

- **Jenkins:**  
  An open-source, free tool dedicated to CI/CD, old but powerful; Jenkins covers everything from application-level task design and permission management to low-level service dispatch and execution. It also has [Plugins](https://plugins.jenkins.io/){:target="_blank"} available for direct use and was an essential tool for early DevOps CI/CD.
translations.- **Scale Set Client:** Simplifies the *:
- **Scale Set Client:** Simplifies the **Autoscaling** of Self-hosted Runners.

- **multi-label: Support Restart**, improving the Runner label experience.

- **Actions Runner Controller (ARC)** Update: Improved Deployment, Observability, and Version Management.

- **Actions Data Stream:** Provides near real-time workflow/runner event data streams for monitoring and analysis.
translations.- Allow team members to focus on core bu: - Allow team members to focus on core business development and reduce manual operation errors
translations.- Automatically Assign Yourself When Cre:
- Automatically assign yourself when creating a PR

- Automatically assign reviewers randomly when creating a PR

- Mark PR size label
translations.- CI \n All changes must pass automate:
- CI  
  All changes must pass automated tests before merging into the main branch. Additionally, a Nightly Build scheduled automated testing process is added to improve stability.

- CD  
  All packaging uses CD uniformly, allowing Developer T and Developer Z to fully focus on business development, reducing manual communication and operational errors.
translations.- Code That Does Not Follow the Coding S:
- Code That Does Not Follow the Coding Style Can Still Be Merged

- Even If the Build Fails, I Can Still Merge

- Changes can be merged even if basic Unit Tests and important checks fail.

- My environment works correctly, but others may not have the same results.

- Affects other developers currently working on the project
translations.- End-User (QA/PM/PD/Developer): Submit:
- End-User (QA/PM/PD/Developer): Submit the packaging form via GAS Web App (fetch the Branch corresponding to the Jira or Asana task) -> GAS calls GitHub API -> triggers CD packaging GitHub Actions <- GitHub self-hosted runner listens for the task and pulls it to the machine for execution -> upon completion, Slack notification is sent, and GAS Web App packaging status is updated.

- End-User (Developer): Open a PR, push a new commit to the PR -> Trigger the CI test process <- GitHub self-hosted runner listens for the task and pulls it to the machine for execution -> After completion, comment the test results and update Checks.
translations.- Ensure all changes meet the expected r: - Ensure all changes meet the expected results, do not affect other functions, and do not impact other team members
translations.- GitHub Hosted Runner — macOS 3-core(M1:
- GitHub Hosted Runner — macOS 3-core(M1): $0.062 USD/minute, 1,000 minutes equals $62 USD

- Self-Hosted Runner — $0.002 USD/minute, 1,000 minutes equals $2 USD
translations.- Google Apps Script Web App (CD Packagi:
- Google Apps Script Web App (CD Packaging Interface) allows engineers, QA, and PMs to package the app on computers or mobile devices through this website.

- GitHub Actions Self-hosted Runner: Using your own machine for unlimited CI/CD usage

- Integrate Firebase App Distribution API to directly obtain the download link for the packaged test version
translations.- January 1, 2026: GitHub-hosted Runner:
- January 1, 2026: GitHub-hosted Runner is now cheaper, with price reductions up to 39%.

- March 1, 2026: **Using Self-hosted Runner requires additional service maintenance fees, $0.002 USD per minute (regardless of OS), which equals $1 for 500 minutes. It is still cost-effective so far.** ️

- Public repositories still retain the same free tier.
translations.- Labor Cost: \n Based on the implemen:
- Labor Cost:  
  Based on the implementation described in this series, it is estimated that 1 person needs about 10 days = **4,800 minutes** to complete the work. (~= **NT$36,384**)

- Equipment and Running Costs:  
  Using GitHub Actions self-hosted Runner only requires purchasing 1–2 [Mac Minis](https://www.apple.com/tw/shop/buy-mac/mac-mini/m4){:target="_blank"} upfront or directly using existing retired MacBook Pros as CI/CD Runners.  
  For example, for a team of 6, purchasing a brand new Mac Mini with 32G RAM M4 Mini (= **NT$40,900**)
translations.- Packaging requires engineers to manual:
- Packaging requires engineers to manually package, interrupting their current development work.

- Switching back and forth between packaging and development incurs a high cognitive switching cost.

- Packaging wait time prevents other development work from proceeding.

- Engineers' time cost is money.

- Manual operations may cause errors.

- QA asks engineers to package (back-and-forth communication).
translations.- Partners can directly fill out forms i: - Partners can directly fill out forms in Slack, trigger CD packaging, and receive Slack notifications.
translations.- Trigger Unit Tests Automatically on PR:
- Trigger Unit Tests Automatically on PR Submission

- Run corresponding tests based on the scope of changed files

- Merge PR only after tests have passed
translations.- Website Web\n\n- Similar to Google Wor:
- Website Web

- Similar to Google Workspace enterprise account permission management, access can be restricted to only Google accounts within the organization.

- **Completely Free**

- **Function as a Service without the need to set up or maintain servers**

- Easier to maintain and hand over

- Can be operated on mobile devices

- **AI Can Help!**  
  **Whether it's ChatGPT or other AI tools, they are very familiar with GAS and can directly help us create packaging forms and connect to the GitHub API.**

- Can also integrate with Jira, Asana, Slack notification APIs

translations.- [Online Demo](https://script.google.co: - [Online Demo](https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbwNW6N5ozKbIz_E1HK6yFEUtA8KQrUciS-jcPsQptvIKlARmKgLxbQzNu8ksVeg-BmEfg/exec){:target="_blank"} Please refer to the authorization image below for first-time use (Only For Demo App):
translations.1. The product has a bug. Developer T cr:
1. The product has a bug. Developer T creates a branch fix/bug-c from the main branch to fix it. After the fix, the branch is merged back into the main branch.

2. Next, Developer Z branched off from the main branch to create feature/a for requirement A. Halfway through, they noticed something was wrong with the feature. **After investigating, they found that the current functionality was broken and the tests were failing**, so they informed Developer T to fix it.

3. After all development is complete, Developer Z **uses his computer to build the version for QA testing, repeatedly fixing and building**. Once everything is confirmed to be fine, the feature is merged back into the main branch.

4. As the Sprint quickly comes to an end, the release package needs to be delivered to users; Developer Z **puts aside their current work** to help package from the main branch for QA to perform regression testing, similarly **repeatedly fixing issues and repackaging**, and finally submitting the packaged app for review.

5. Released to users after Apple/Google review is completed.

translations.GitHub Actions 受限於 [GitHub 服務狀態](https:/: GitHub Actions depends on [GitHub Service Status](https://www.githubstatus.com/){:target="_blank"} (if GitHub goes down, it will also be affected), but outages are rare, with an average uptime of 99.9%. If issues do occur, you just wait for them to be fixed.

translations.Jeknins 有機會因為系統升級或裝到有衝突的 Plugin 導致服務崩潰 (: Jenkins may crash due to system upgrades or installing conflicting plugins (but if it’s running fine and you don’t touch it, it usually has no issues).
translations.Jenkins 全開源免費權掌握在手，GitHub Actions 部分開源但任: Jenkins is fully open-source and free to use, giving you complete control. GitHub Actions is partially open-source, but task dispatching and execution run on GitHub's closed SaaS service. Currently, GitHub Actions is completely free; you only pay when using GitHub Runners. Starting from 2026-03-01, using self-hosted Runners will also incur a maintenance fee of $0.002 USD per minute [source](https://resources.github.com/actions/2026-pricing-changes-for-github-actions/){:target="_blank"}. Public repositories have free usage quotas for these fees.
translations.Jenkins 從頭到尾都掌控在自己手上，客製化的權限比較大，可以影響到整個系統: Jenkins is fully controlled by yourself, allowing greater customization of permissions that can affect the entire system. GitHub Actions can only customize different steps at the application level.
translations.Public repository 仍保持相同免費額度。\n: Public repositories still retain the same free tier.
translations.QA 要請工程師打包 (來回溝通)\n: QA asks engineers to package (back-and-forth communication)
translations.Self-Hosted Runner — $0.002 USD/分鐘、1,000: Self-Hosted Runner — $0.002 USD/minute, 1,000 minutes equals $2 USD
translations.[***本系列文章花費了大量的時間精力撰寫，如果內容對您有幫助、對您的團隊有實質: [***This series of articles took a lot of time and effort to write. If the content helps you and effectively improves your team's work efficiency and product quality, please consider buying me a coffee. Thank you for your support!***](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/zhgchgli){:target="_blank"}
translations.[**CI/CD 實戰指南（一）：CI/CD 是什麼？如何透過 CI/CD 打造: [**CI/CD Practical Guide (Part 1): What is CI/CD? How to Build a Stable and Efficient Development Team with CI/CD? Tool Selection?**](../c008a9e8ceca/)
translations.[**CI/CD 實戰指南（三）：使用 GitHub Actions 實作 Ap: [**CI/CD Practical Guide (Part 3): Implementing CI and CD Workflows for App Projects Using GitHub Actions**](../4b001d2e8440/)
translations.[**CI/CD 實戰指南（二）：GitHub Actions 與 self-h: [**CI/CD Practical Guide (Part 2): Complete Guide to Using and Setting Up GitHub Actions and Self-hosted Runner**](../404bd5c70040/)
translations.[**CI/CD 實戰指南（四）：使用 Google Apps Script W: [**CI/CD Practical Guide (Part 4): Using Google Apps Script Web App to Integrate GitHub Actions and Build a Free, Easy-to-Use Packaging Tool Platform**](../4273e57e7148/)
translations.[**官方的價格計算器也更新了**](https://github.com/pr: [**The official pricing calculator has also been updated**](https://github.com/pricing/calculator){:target="_blank"} **:**
translations.[Demo Web App (首次使用請參考下方教學)](https://scr: [Demo Web App (Please refer to the tutorial below for first-time use)](https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbwNW6N5ozKbIz_E1HK6yFEUtA8KQrUciS-jcPsQptvIKlARmKgLxbQzNu8ksVeg-BmEfg/exec){:target="_blank"}
translations.[Online Demo](https://script.google.com/: [Online Demo](https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbwNW6N5ozKbIz_E1HK6yFEUtA8KQrUciS-jcPsQptvIKlARmKgLxbQzNu8ksVeg-BmEfg/exec){:target="_blank"} Please refer to the authorization image below for first-time use (Only For Demo App):
translations.[TLDR — On January 1, 2026, we are lower: [TLDR — On January 1, 2026, we are lowering the price of hosted runners, and beginning March 1, 2026, we will charge $0.002 per minute for self-hosted runners. The vast majority of customers will not see any change to their bill. Actions will remain free for public repositories.](https://resources.github.com/actions/2026-pricing-changes-for-github-actions/){:target="_blank"}
translations.一切開發完畢後，Developer Z **使用他的電腦打包版本給 QA 測試，: After all development is complete, Developer Z **uses his computer to build the version for QA testing, repeatedly fixing and building**. Once everything is confirmed to be fine, the feature is merged back into the main branch.
translations.一樣能串接 Jira,Asana,Slack 通知 API\n: Can also integrate with Jira, Asana, Slack notification APIs
translations.不符合 Coding Style 的程式碼也能 Merge\n: Code That Does Not Follow the Coding Style Can Still Be Merged
translations.串接 Firebase App Distribution API 直接取得打包的: Integrate Firebase App Distribution API to directly obtain the download link for the packaged test version
translations.之前也從身邊能接觸到的 iOS 開發者(約 30 位)做過調查，懂 Jenkin: I previously surveyed about 30 iOS developers around me. Only a handful (2) understood Jenkins, while more than 10 were using GitHub Actions. After all, you can complete CI/CD tasks just by writing some YAML.
translations.之前有分享過「 [使用 Google Apps Script Web App 表: Previously shared "[Using Google Apps Script Web App Form to Connect Github Action CI/CD Workflow](../4cb4437818f2/)":
translations.人力成本：\n照本系列文章建置，粗估需投入人力 1 人花費 10 天 = **4:
Labor Cost:  
Based on the implementation described in this series, it is estimated that 1 person needs about 10 days = **4,800 minutes** to complete the work. (~= **NT$36,384**)
translations.介面上 GitHub Actions 是新的工具在介面使用上比 Jenkins: In terms of interface, GitHub Actions is a newer tool and is easier to use than Jenkins. Regarding script configuration, Jenkins uses Pipeline Scripts stored on Jenkins, while GitHub Actions uses YAML files managed with the project’s Git, making it easier to set up than Jenkins.
translations.以 App (iOS) Team 為例，帶您從 0 認識 CI/CD 與導入後能: Using the App (iOS) Team as an example, this guide introduces CI/CD from scratch and the tangible value it brings after implementation.
translations.但如果是全封閉網路環境，Jenkins 會比 GitHub Actions 安全: However, in a fully closed network environment, Jenkins is more secure than GitHub Actions.
translations.使用操作起來很順暢並且統一在日常的辦公工具上(SSOT) 不需重新學習；但是他背: The operation is smooth and unified within everyday office tools (SSOT), requiring no relearning; however, the underlying issue is that **development and maintenance costs are very high**. One reason is that Slack Outgoing-Webhook API demands a very fast response (within 3 seconds), which basically rules out using FAAS services for simple integration (e.g., Cloud Functions, GAS, Lambda…).
translations.來回在打包與開發之間，心流切換成本極高\n: Switching back and forth between packaging and development incurs a high cognitive switching cost.
translations.例如目前 GitHub Actions 內建的 Artifacts 不支援 se: For example, since the built-in Artifacts in GitHub Actions do not support self-hosted runners, you can only use a shell script in the step to copy files to another directory, and cannot customize Artifacts implementation yourself.
translations.依照 App 開發的場景，比較偏向是 **Continuous Delivery: In the context of App development, it leans more towards **Continuous Delivery**, where we want a manual check to confirm everything is flawless before the App is officially released, ensuring the release timing and functionality are accurate.
translations.依照改動檔案範圍執行對應測試\n: Run corresponding tests based on the scope of changed files
translations.另一個工具選擇是 Google Apps Script Web App，會需要多: Another tool option is Google Apps Script Web App. The reason for needing this is that GitHub Actions' built-in form feature is too basic (the interface is too technical and static) and its execution permissions are tied to the GitHub Repo. This makes it very inconvenient if we want to provide access to other functional team members.
translations.另外 Jenkins 跟 GitHub 溝通之間需要開 API/WebHook: Additionally, communication between Jenkins and GitHub requires opening API/WebHook ports, which is relatively risky. GitHub and GitHub Actions integrate seamlessly, and the relationship between GitHub Actions and the self-hosted Runner is observer mode. The self-hosted Runner requests tasks from GitHub, so the Runner itself does not need to open external ports.
translations.另外也可以增加 Nightly Build、更多的自動化測試環節，確保穩定性。\: You can also add Nightly Builds and more automated testing steps to ensure stability.
translations.同 Google Workspace 企業帳號權限管理，可設定只有組織內的 Go: Similar to Google Workspace enterprise account permission management, access can be restricted to only Google accounts within the organization.
translations.同上只需參考官方文件學習 GitHub Actions 可用 YAML 指令跟如: Refer only to the official documentation to learn the available YAML commands for GitHub Actions and how to run your own Runner locally.
translations.回顧 2021 年在 Pinkoi 的演講「 [**2021 Pinkoi Te: Looking back at the 2021 Pinkoi talk "[**2021 Pinkoi Tech Career Talk — Secrets of High-Efficiency Engineering Teams**](../11f6c8568154/)," the content basically revolves around the same points: "automation, reducing dependencies between people, and focusing on core business." Implementing CI/CD fully aligns with these three directions, so we can use the same approach to estimate its effectiveness.
translations.因此我們需要一個「介面」工具提供給其他夥伴使用或甚至是自己工程師更方便的使用。\: Therefore, we need an "interface" tool for other team members or even our own engineers to use more conveniently.
translations.團隊人數 6 人 / 一個月來計算\n\n: Team size: 6 people / calculated per month
translations.團隊工作效率與產品穩定性 🚀🚀🚀🚀🚀\n\n: Team Work Efficiency and Product Stability 🚀🚀🚀🚀🚀
translations.在以上故事中我們可以歸納出兩個大問題。\n\n: In the above story, we can summarize two major issues.
translations.在有完整 DevOps Team 的團隊無庸置疑的應該還是會選擇 Jenkins: For teams with a full DevOps team, Jenkins is undoubtedly still the preferred choice. After all, in other domains (such as Web, backend, Java…), Jenkins has been running the longest, offers the most useful plugins, and can unify the CI/CD setup for all teams, making management easier. It also supports complex CI/CD scenarios like backend deployment followed by automatic frontend deployment.
translations.在談 CI/CD 究竟是什麼之前我們先拋開「CI/CD」這個詞，先來回想一下一個: Before discussing what CI/CD actually is, let's set aside the term "CI/CD" and first recall how a startup development team without any workflow in place would work. The general process can be roughly summarized in the diagram below:
translations.夥伴可以直接在 Slack 中使用表單填寫資訊、並觸發 CD 打包、收到 Sla: Partners can directly fill out forms in Slack, trigger CD packaging, and receive Slack notifications.
translations.對應 Question 1「持續整合」旨在確保所有變動都能自動執行統一環境的 B: Corresponding to Question 1, "Continuous Integration" aims to ensure that all changes automatically undergo Build & Test in a unified environment, guaranteeing that all modifications pass every test case and meet team standards before entering the production environment — "continuously and automatically ensuring the correct code is integrated into production."
translations.對應 Question 2「持續部署」旨在確保程式碼在 CI 環節無異常之後，將: For Question 2, "Continuous Deployment" aims to ensure that after the code passes the CI stage without issues, the changes are automatically packaged and deployed through the complex process to internal testing (QA, Debug, Staging, Beta…) or external release (Production, Release…).
translations.就數量上 GitHub Actions 大於 Jenkins，但是 Jenkin: In terms of quantity, GitHub Actions outnumbers Jenkins, but Jenkins offers deeper and more powerful CI/CD features. Many of GitHub Actions are simply automation functions.
translations.就算 Build 不起來我也能 Merge\n: Even If the Build Fails, I Can Still Merge
translations.廢話不多說，先上最終結果。\n\n: No more words, here is the final result.
translations.影響到其他正在開發的人\n: Affects other developers currently working on the project
translations.很快地也到了 Sprint 尾聲需要打包釋出給使用者；Developer Z *: As the Sprint quickly comes to an end, the release package needs to be delivered to users; Developer Z **puts aside their current work** to help package from the main branch for QA to perform regression testing, similarly **repeatedly fixing issues and repackaging**, and finally submitting the packaged app for review.
translations.我的環境功能正確但其他人不一定正確\n: My environment works correctly, but others may not have the same results.
translations.手機上可以操作\n: Can be operated on mobile devices
translations.打包等待時間無法進行其他開發工作\n: Packaging wait time prevents other development work from proceeding
translations.打包要透過工程師人力打包，中斷當前開發工作\n: Packaging requires engineers to manually package, interrupting their current development work.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本篇主要是帶大家初步了解 CI/CD 是什麼跟帶來的效益，下一篇開始會進入技術環: This article mainly provides an introduction to what CI/CD is and its benefits. Starting from the next article, we will dive into the technical aspects, guiding you step-by-step to understand and implement GitHub Actions CI/CD until achieving the final results mentioned earlier.
translations.本系列文章會從「CI/CD 是什麼、能帶來哪些價值」開始講起，接著開始手把手實作: This series will start by explaining "What CI/CD is and the value it brings," followed by a hands-on guide on "How to set up a CI/CD environment using GitHub Actions + self-hosted Runner" and "Implementing CI and CD in app development as an example." Finally, it will introduce how to "Use Google Apps Script Web App combined with GitHub Actions to create an easy-to-use app packaging platform for cross-team collaboration." We hope this series is helpful to you.
translations.歷經了兩次在不同開發團隊建置 App CI/CD 的經驗，最近終於有時間整理這段: After two experiences building App CI/CD in different development teams, I finally have time to organize the journey from "why to do it" to "how to do it." While I can't guarantee this is the most standard CI/CD workflow, it is definitely a valuable starting point to help your team begin implementation, improve product stability, and boost overall development efficiency.
translations.測試通過 (passed) 後才能 Merge PR\n: Merge PR only after tests have passed
translations.產品有一個 Bug，Developer T 從主分支開分支 fix/bug-c: The product has a bug. Developer T creates a branch fix/bug-c from the main branch to fix it. After the fix, the branch is merged back into the main branch.
translations.異動後基本的 Unit Tests、重要檢查項目都沒過也能 Merge\n: Changes can be merged even if basic Unit Tests and important checks fail.
translations.當我們持續投入工作一段時間後就會進入「心流」狀態，此時的思緒、生產力都達到巔峰，: After working continuously for a period, we enter a "flow" state where our thoughts and productivity peak, allowing us to produce the most effective output. However, if interrupted, it takes time to return to this flow state—here, we use 30 minutes as an example.
translations.發 PR 自動 Assign self\n: Automatically Assign Yourself When Creating a PR
translations.發 PR 自動觸發單元測試\n: Trigger Unit Tests Automatically on PR Submission
translations.發 PR 自動隨機指定 Reviewer\n: Automatically Assign Reviewers Randomly When Creating a PR
translations.確保所有調整都符合正確的預期結果、不影響其他功能、不影響其他成員\n: Ensure all changes meet the expected results, do not affect other functions, and do not impact other team members
translations.第一次導入 CI/CD 的時候我們選擇串接 Slack API 達成類似如下效果: When we first implemented CI/CD, we chose to integrate the Slack API to achieve a similar effect:
translations.第二推廣我就改用 GAS Web App 給夥伴使用，同樣得到很好的反響，跟 S: For the second promotion, I switched to using GAS Web App for the team, which also received great feedback. The only difference from Slack is that you need to bookmark one more URL. When packaging is needed, just open the URL and operate the packaging through the web form.
translations.結合敏捷開發的核心理念「小步快跑，快速迭代」CI/CD 為其提供了「頻繁持續迭代: Combining the core agile development principle of "small steps, fast iterations," CI/CD provides the foundation for stability and work efficiency during frequent continuous feature iterations.
translations.緊接著 Developer Z 從主分支開分支 feature/a 做 需求 A: Next, Developer Z branched off from the main branch to create feature/a for requirement A. Halfway through, they noticed something was wrong with the feature. **After investigating, they found that the current functionality was broken and the tests were failing**, so they informed Developer T to fix it.
translations.總花費成本約 **NT$80,000** 元就能完成建置，約半年後開始享受效益。: The total cost is about **NT$80,000**, with benefits starting to be realized after around six months.
translations.考量到 GitHub Actions/Runner 服務本身是 GitHub 在: Considering that GitHub Actions/Runner services are maintained and automatically updated by GitHub itself, this may be safer than Jenkins, which requires manual updates.
translations.設備與執行成本：\n使用 GitHub Actions self-hosted:
Equipment and Running Costs:  
Using GitHub Actions self-hosted Runner only requires purchasing 1–2 [Mac Minis](https://www.apple.com/tw/shop/buy-mac/mac-mini/m4){:target="_blank"} upfront or directly using existing retired MacBook Pros as CI/CD Runners.  
For example, for a team of 6, purchasing a brand new Mac Mini with 32G RAM M4 Mini (= **NT$40,900**)
translations.讓團隊成員可以專注在主要業務開發、減少人工操作錯誤\n: Allow team members to focus on core business development and reduce manual operation errors
translations.較容易維護與交接\n: Easier to maintain and hand over
translations.這邊先用一張不是很專業的結構分層圖來說明兩者的差異，Jenkins 如前述是從上: Here is a simple layered diagram to explain the difference between the two. As mentioned earlier, Jenkins covers all functions from top to bottom, making self-hosting much more complex. In contrast, GitHub Actions only requires writing YAML workflows on GitHub. The local machine just needs to register a GitHub self-hosted Runner (completed with 5 commands), and GitHub will automatically dispatch tasks to the local machine. GitHub is responsible for maintaining everything else, including GitHub Actions/Runner version upgrades and task dispatch issues, so we don't need to handle them.
translations.這邊先附上完整的工作流程，下篇開始會逐步介紹每個工具如何使用與串接。\n\n: Here is the complete workflow. The next article will gradually introduce how to use and integrate each tool.
translations.這邊我們以每個月為基準，假設在無 CI/CD 流程時，每個月會發生 4 次意外改: Here, we take a monthly basis as an example. Without a CI/CD process, there are 4 unexpected main branch breakages each month, resulting in about 720 minutes spent on fixing and communication. Adding the time for monthly packaging of test and release versions, plus errors caused by manual operations, the total reaches around 1,010 minutes. With an engineer's monthly salary of 80,000, this results in approximately 13,000 in wasted costs each month.
translations.這點我覺得 GitHub Actions 略勝 Jenkins。\n\n: In this aspect, I think GitHub Actions slightly outperforms Jenkins.
translations.這點沒法比，Jenkins 已做了快 20 年，GitHub Actions 還: This aspect is incomparable. Jenkins has been around for nearly 20 years, while GitHub Actions still needs to add many features; for example: permission management, secret management (currently only plain text is supported, key files must be converted to plain text first), Cache/Artifact currently only supports Cloud, and so on.
translations.這點需要特別挑出來比較，Jenkins 可以另外設定帳號登入權限進行控管；Git: This point needs special emphasis for comparison: Jenkins allows setting up separate account login permissions for control; GitHub Actions is directly tied to the GitHub repo, so only users with repo permissions can use it.
translations.還有另一個比較麻煩的點是 Jenkins 是獨立於 Git 的服務，之間要透過: Another troublesome point is that Jenkins is a service independent of Git, so communication between them must be done via APIs (e.g., GitHub API/WebHook), making the setup more complex.
